overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain valley at night beneath the aurora borealis. The character lights a handheld torch as they enter a darker forested area, transitioning from natural aurora lighting to warm torch illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain valley under aurora

agents.ego_description: character riding a horse at a steady trot through the open valley, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: tall snow-capped mountain peaks forming the valley walls
green and purple northern lights shimmering across the night sky
evergreen trees scattered on the snowy slopes
evergreen trees scattered on the snowy slopes
snow-covered dirt path winding through the valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain valley at night, illuminated by the aurora borealis overhead. The character rides a horse along a snow-covered trail toward distant peaks, with sparse pine trees dotting the slopes on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain path with rocky outcrops

events.description: entering denser forest area as trees close in on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse between closely spaced pine trees along the narrowing trail

entered.detail: large boulders and rock formations emerging from the snow

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character rides into a more densely forested area, with pine trees now flanking the trail closely. Rocky outcrops emerge from the snow on the left, while the aurora shifts toward the right side of the sky as the valley curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense dark forest illuminated by torchlight

events.description: character lights a torch, casting warm orange light on the immediate surroundings

agents.ego_description: riding through the dark forest with torch held high, illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: flaming torch held by the rider casting dynamic shadows on trees and rocks

segments.scene_description: As darkness deepens under the dense forest canopy, the character lights a torch at 37 seconds, transforming the scene with warm flickering orange light. The aurora disappears from view overhead, and the path becomes rockier as the horse navigates between closely packed trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a snowy mountain valley that transitions from the ethereal glow of the aurora borealis to the intimate warmth of a handheld torch. It begins with a wide view of a snow-covered trail leading toward distant peaks under a shimmering night sky. As the horse advances, the open valley narrows into a dense forest where pine trees flank the path and rocky outcrops emerge from the snow. The scene then shifts into deeper darkness under a thick canopy, causing the aurora to vanish from view just as the character lights a torch. This final transition floods the rocky trail with flickering orange light, illuminating the closely packed trees as the journey continues.
